stats.label: EU AI Act transparency deadline: chatbots must disclose AI status, AI-generated content must be labelled (Article 50)
Maximum fine for prohibited AI practices — the higher of the fixed amount or % of global annual turnover applies
Deferred deadline for standalone Annex III high-risk AI (HR, credit scoring, biometrics) after May 2026 Digital Omnibus deal
stats.source: EU Digital Omnibus provisional agreement, 7 May 2026

stats.label: Annual turnover below which the %-of-turnover fine cap always applies — the operative limit for virtually all UK SMEs
stats.source: Tom & Co analysis of EU AI Act Article 99 penalty thresholds, EUR/GBP 0.845, June 2026

stats.label: Date from which Article 5 prohibited-AI bans and Article 4 AI literacy obligations already apply to in-scope UK businesses
stats.source: EU AI Act Article 5 and Article 4, Regulation (EU) 2024/1689
